_meta.note: POSTED marketplace rates — the display-only trust surface ('what your $12 buys'). NOT a billing ledger and NOT a balance gate: you pay for exactly what you booked at fixed price. Editable without code — these numbers drive the estimator table on listings and the per-use estimate on the active Tools card. Distinct from config/model-prices.json (the internal cost estimator).

asr.label: Transcription (ASR)
asr.note: One video-minute of speech-to-text on a rented GPU.

gpu.label: GPU compute
gpu.note: Wall-clock minute of a shared GPU for a job (e.g. overnight transcription/sim).
